Class ResearchService

java.lang.Object
app.service.ResearchService
public class ResearchService extends Object
Provides research-related application services such as paper management, project creation, journal subscription, and research analytics.

  • Constructor Details

    • ResearchService

      public ResearchService(RbacService rbacService, AuditLogger auditLogger)

  • Method Details

    • addPaper

      public ResearchPaper addPaper(User actor, Researcher researcher, String title, List<String> authors, String journal, String school, int pages, int citations, String doi, LocalDate date)
      Creates a paper, adds it to a researcher's profile, and stores it in the system.
      Parameters:
      actor - the user performing the action
      researcher - the target researcher
      title - paper title
      authors - paper authors
      journal - journal name
      school - school or research area
      pages - article length in pages
      citations - citation count
      doi - DOI identifier
      date - publication date
      Returns:
      created research paper

    • printAllPapers

      public void printAllPapers(String sortBy)

    • printResearcherPapers

      public void printResearcherPapers(Researcher researcher, String sortBy)

    • topBySchool

      public Optional<Researcher> topBySchool(String school)

    • topCurrentYear

      public Optional<Researcher> topCurrentYear()

    • createProject

      public ResearchProject createProject(User actor, String topic)
      Creates a research project with the provided topic.
      Parameters:
      actor - the user creating the project
      topic - project topic
      Returns:
      created research project

    • addParticipant

      public void addParticipant(User actor, ResearchProject project, Object participant) throws NotResearcherException
      Adds a participant to a research project.
      Parameters:
      actor - the user performing the action
      project - target project
      participant - participant candidate
      Throws:
      NotResearcherException - if the participant does not satisfy project rules

      public void subscribeJournal(User actor)
